title: Ant Group and HKUST(GZ) Propose Skill-MAS, Turning Multi-Agent Orchestration into Evolvable Meta-Skills
snippet: Ant Group and HKUST(GZ) introduce Skill-MAS, a framework that evolves multi-agent system design experience into reusable meta-skills, validated on DeepSeek-V4-Flash and other models.

title: Humanoid Robots Enter the Frontline: From Show Floor to Factory Floor as Star Employees
snippet: Humanoid robots are transitioning from showcases to real workplaces, with robots deployed in factories and logistics centers achieving 85% of human efficiency.
